creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Package building errors url shows this port as being broken (PLIST)
	for some time.

Fix: uuencoded tarball contains new patch (patch-ae) and a diff to
	take lang/tclX80 to 8.0.4

	Maintainer was contacted, but no response :(
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd lang/tclX80; make all install package
